name: Pizzazz Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In an ungreased 15 1/2 x 10 1/2 x 2-inch baking pan, combine oyster crackers, shredded wheat biscuits, and oat cereal. Set the cereal mixture aside.
2. In a small saucepan, combine oil, garlic salt, dried oregano, dried basil, and hot pepper sauce. Heat over low heat for 2 minutes.
3. Stir the oil mixture until well blended. Drizzle over the cereal mixture and toss gently to coat the cereal evenly.
4. Bake in a 300°F oven for 20 minutes. Stir once and bake for an additional 20 minutes more.
5. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese and toss gently to coat the cereal.
6. Cool the mixture, stirring occasionally. Store in an airtight container in a cool, dry place. Makes 12 (1/2-cup) servings.
